message:
feat(polyfills): thin JS, rich Zig - wire up native functions properly

- path.zig: add isAbsolute() and relative() functions
- path.js: thin to just posix/win32/node: aliases (8 lines vs 70)
- buffer.js: wire up native helpers for equals, compare, indexOf,
  lastIndexOf, copy, subarray, toUtf8String, toHex
- crypto.zig: add randomBytes() and randomUUID() using std.crypto.random
  (SECURITY FIX: replaces insecure Math.random() implementation)
- crypto.js: thin wrapper delegating to Zig natives

JS is now thin glue, Zig does heavy lifting with proper native calls.
